sentence: go to amazon.com, search for wireless mouse, filter to 4 stars and up, and open the first result

workflow.name: Start Browsing
workflow.description: Start from a fresh tab and navigate to Amazon.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: On Amazon Homepage
workflow.description: Locate the search bar and search for 'wireless mouse'.
triggers: If the current URL contains amazon.com
If a search input with placeholder 'Search Amazon' is visible
actions: Type 'wireless mouse' into the search input with placeholder 'Search Amazon'

workflow.name: On Search Results Page
workflow.description: Apply the '4 Stars & Up' filter to the search results.
triggers: If the current URL contains amazon.com/s?k=wireless+mouse
If a link or element with text '4 Stars & Up' is visible
actions: Click the link or element with text '4 Stars & Up'

workflow.name: On Filtered Search Results Page
workflow.description: Open the first product result after filtering.
triggers: If the current URL contains amazon.com/s?k=wireless+mouse
If the current URL contains rh=p_72%3A1248879011
actions: Click the first product title link in the search results

workflow.name: On Product Page
workflow.description: Confirm that the product page has loaded.
triggers: If the current URL contains amazon.com/dp/
actions: Terminate: The first wireless mouse product page (4 stars & up) has been opened.
